name: Bendigo And Adelaide Bank Limited
analysis: BEN has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 19% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.4× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$10.5800, stop A$9.8505, target A$11.7000 (1.54:1) — then trail it.
